nasb.text: to make a distinction between the unclean and the clean, and between the edible creature and the creature which is not to be eaten.

esv.text: to make a distinction between the unclean and the clean and between the living creature that may be eaten and the living creature that may not be eaten.

cnv.text: 為要把不潔淨的和潔淨的，可吃的生物和不可吃的生物，分別出來。

ccb.text: 使你们可以分清什么是洁净的、什么是不洁净的、什么是可吃的、什么是不可吃的。”
